scripts.test:syntax: node --check app.js && node --check location-core.mjs && node --check ui-core.mjs && node --check ui-shell.mjs && node --check ui-dialogs.mjs && node --check ui-components.mjs && node --check data-client.mjs && sh scripts/python.sh -m py_compile server.py mcp_server.py oauth_service.py foodiemap_service.py scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_postgres_gcs.py
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/location-core.test.mjs tests/ui-core.test.mjs tests/ui-components.test.mjs tests/data-client.test.mjs && npm run test:syntax
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:mcp && playwright test --project=desktop --project=mobile
